heading: Support for international election observation and democratic civil society
label: 9731 Support for international election observation and democratic civil society

children.text: shall work with the Organization of American States to ensure credible international observation of future elections in Venezuela that contributes to free, fair, and transparent democratic electoral processes; and

children.label: A
children.text: to strengthen democratic governance and institutions, including the democratically elected National Assembly of Venezuela;

children.label: B
children.text: to defend internationally recognized human rights for the people of Venezuela, including support for efforts to document crimes against humanity and violations of human rights;

children.label: C
children.text: to support the efforts of independent media outlets to broadcast, distribute, and share information beyond the limited channels made available by the Maduro regime; and

children.label: D
children.text: to combat corruption and improve the transparency and accountability of institutions that are part of the Maduro regime.

children.heading: Engagement at the Organization of American States
children.label: b Engagement at the Organization of American States
children.text: The Secretary of State, acting through the United States Permanent Representative to the Organization of American States, should advocate and build diplomatic support for sending an election observation mission to Venezuela to ensure that democratic electoral processes are organized and carried out in a free, fair, and transparent manner.
the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate;
the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate;
the Committee on Foreign Affairs of the House of Representatives; and
the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of State for fiscal year 2020, $17,500,000 to carry out the activities set forth in subsection (a).

children.heading: Notification requirements
children.label: 2 Notification requirements
children.text: Amounts appropriated pursuant to paragraph (1) are subject to the notification requirements applicable to expenditures from the Economic Support Fund under and from the Development Assistance Fund under , to the extent that such funds are expended.section 2346(c) of this titlesection 2413(a) of this title
